[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 00000011 2
2 01010000 2
3 10001100 3
4 01000001 2
5 00010011 3
6 01010100 3
7 00000000 a

01 00001100 2
12 00000000 a match 7
